Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Lost Choice
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +37% (augmented)
Pack Size: +17% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +23% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +90% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 209(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +22(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Prefix Modifier "Tough" (Tier: 1) }
22(20-25)% more Monster Life
{ Prefix Modifier "Thunderous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 16(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Lightning
{ Suffix Modifier "of Buffering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters gain 19(12-25)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
{ Suffix Modifier "Sleet" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Chilled Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Fatigue" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 28(30-25)% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
